genre_preference.value: drama, comedy, thriller, police procedural, historical
evidence: "Very good police procedural, with great cast..."
"The sinking of the Titanic is one of the best-documented disasters in history..."
"The story is a bit complex but makes (nearly) complete sense..."
"The screenplay... departs from the book in some significant ways..."
"Has the problems of old movies... in its slow pacing..."
"I enjoyed the two seasons — especially season 1."
"Every aspect of the show is perfect..."
"The production values are good, acting is good."
"Been a fan of Wes Anderson since my wife and I first saw 'Bottle Rocket'..."
"Not Gosford Park but if you like Julian Fellowes, you'll like this."
"The cinematography, etc. But I want to mention the music in particular."
"...genuinely moving and even to convey some wisdom."

summary: The user enjoys a mix of drama, comedy, and historical narratives, with a strong preference for high-quality production and emotional depth. They appreciate the works of specific creators like Wes Anderson and Julian Fellowes, indicating a loyalty to their styles and storytelling techniques.
